name: Mom's Tuna Noodle Casserole Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 5 ounces White tuna water pack, well drained
10 1/2 ounces Cream of Mushroom soup, heated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl.
2. Set the darkness control at 12 o'clock on your bread maker.
3. Select white bread setting and start the machine.
4. The finished bread should be stored in the refrigerator or freezer.
5. This bread has the aroma and taste of our mom's favorite Sunday night supper.
